videos.headline: Coastal Carolina gets on the board with a big TD catch and run
videos.description: Tyler Keane pass finds Malcolm Williams for 86 -yard touchdown pass.

videos.headline: Warhawk's Green returns kick for TD
videos.description: Marcus Green returns Masamitsu Ishibashi's kick for an impressive 82-yard run touchdown for UL Monroe.

videos.headline: Coastal Carolina answers back with TD
videos.description: Tyler  Keane connects with Malcom Williams for a 27-yards touchdown to close the gap.

videos.headline: Chanticleers' complete two-point conversion with unique formation
videos.description: Tyler Keane passes to Alex James to complete a two-point conversion for Coastal Carolina

videos.headline: Luckett dives into end zone for TD
videos.description: Ben Luckett sneaks his way into the end zone with a 1-yard touchdown to pad UL Monroe's lead.

videos.headline: Gore finds gap to score TD
videos.description: Derrick Gore breaks several tackles and scores on a 10-yard touchdown run for the Warhawks.

videos.headline: Coastal Carolina cuts deficit with rushing TD
videos.description: Alex James cuts UL Monroe's lead with a 1-yard touchdown run.

videos.headline: UL Monroe pads lead with TD
videos.description: Caleb Evans connects with Sloan Spiller for a 20-yard touchdown to add to their lead.

videos.headline: Chanticleers cut deficit with 1-yard TD
videos.description: Coastal Carolina's Marcus Outlow sneaks into end zone to get the Chanticleers closer to the Warhawks.

videos.headline: Kjosa leaps over defender to make TD catch
videos.description: Maxwell Kjosa leaps to catch Tyler Keane's 5-yard touchdown pass to  chip away at UL Monroe's lead.

videos.headline: Kjosa makes second TD catch of the game
videos.description: Tyler Keane passes to Maxwell Kjosa for a 9-yard touchdown to get the Chanticleers within two.

videos.headline: Coastal Carolina's last ditch effort goes awry
videos.description: Coastal Carolina attempts last second laterals and UL Monroe picks up the loose ball and returns it for a touchdown.
